The '''Scarab Mark 3 Assassin Droid''', most commonly known as '''sleeper droids''', was a product of [[Sienar Intelligence Systems/Legends|Sienar Intelligence Systems]], a division of [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]]. These pseudo-[[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] were held aloft by three [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]], armed with a [[Stun blaster/Legends|stun blaster]] and a dart launcher, and were protected by an electrically-charged covering. The Mark 3 was designed to capture rather than kill its prey, in compliance with the laws of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], which prohibited the use of assassination droids. The Mark 3's predecessors, Marks 1 and 2, were outlawed for their capability to [[Death/Legends|kill]]; units of those types were used mostly by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] agents for assassinations.
